name: HWM_TCD_EXP_DATA_DEF_B
description: TCD Export Data Definition Basic Table

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Id for the time device export data definition

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_NAME1
columns.Comments: ADDITIONAL_NAME1

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_NAME2
columns.Comments: ADDITIONAL_NAME2

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_DEF_CODE
columns.Comments: Time device export data code in the text mode

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: FIRST_NAME

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: LAST_NAME

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME
columns.Comments: Indicates person name is selected or not in the export definition

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Indicates person number is selected or not in the export definition

columns.Name: PERSON_BADGE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates person badge id is selected or not in the export definition

columns.Name: PAY_TIME_TYPES
columns.Comments: Indicates payroll time types is selected or not in the export definition

columns.Name: SCHEDULE
columns.Comments: Indicates schedule is selected or not in the export definition

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Tcd exp start date is the date from which the schedule info will be sent

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration to be used to calculate schedule end date from the start date

columns.Name: TCD_VENDOR_CODE
columns.Comments: TCD_VENDOR_CODE

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_SERVICE_END_POINT
columns.Comments: Time device vendor service end point to be used to send the data

columns.Name: TCD_EXPORT_BATCH_SIZE
columns.Comments: TCD_EXPORT_BATCH_SIZE

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_SRVC_MAP_ID
columns.Comments: Reference id of the table which contains the mapping between vendor service operation parameter names and oracle internal naming convention

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_DEF_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Time device export data definition category

columns.Name: DELETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: DELETE_FLAG

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Id

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
